subcodes.first_line: Say: O God of existence and Master of the unseen and the seen! Thou beholdest my standing and my sitting, performed purely for Thy sake, and Thou hearest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا اله الوجود و مالک الغیب و الشهود تری قیامی و قعودی خالصا لوجهک و تسمع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition
